conservative.name: Hopeful Dawn
conservative.requirements: You must invoke the blessing at sunrise

success.description: As dawn breaks, you cry out to Shallya in hope and praise. All characters within long range gain on their Resilience check to recover wounds after this past night's rest. In addition, those checks gain: " Turn a critical wound facedown"
As above, and all affected characters recover normal wounds equal to your character rank

boon.description: All characters within long range of you gain to all Resilience checks to resist disease, corruption, poison, and similar hazards until sunset

sigmarsComet.description: The first time today that you invoke a blessing that causes a target to recover 1 or more wounds, that target recovers 1 additional wound
